name: Ino Yamanaka (Shippuden)
description:
After a discussion between Sakura and Ino, where you're involved, Sakura left extremally annoyed, not being very wise to follow the annoyed Sakura, you will have to stay with Ino, at least until Sakura cools down, but maybe Sakura patience is not the only thing getting hot here.

Credits for the art: Jrpuls3, and the other images are from Valenvenge and Arachnart. (Now is time of Ino, one of the blondie hotties of Naruto. The next girl is going to be Hinata, just wait, guys.)
